title: Suspicious Rewards
description: Wanna put items in to Suspicious Sand/Gravel? Maybe it's time to try this datapack!
body:
## Description
Have you ever wanted to be bale to put stuff in to suspicious sand or gravel with out needing to learn commands or be an admin? well, Suspicious Rewards is a datapack that allows you to put any item in to sand/gravel or suspicious sand/suspicious gravel!

## Configs
These commands are used to mess around with the datapack,

This command will change how long the diging duration takes:

### Sand

```
/scoreboard players set %Config Config_Sand_Dig_Duration <Number>
```

### Gravel

```
/scoreboard players set %Config Config_Gravel_Dig_Duration <Number>
```
